trackName: Strategic Reasoning — LLM-as-player across 20 combat states
methodology: Direct Sonnet 4.6 strategic analysis across 20 hand-crafted combat states. Haiku sub-agent spawn downgraded per track constraints (sub-agents cannot spawn nested agents in this context). 20 states analyzed directly as the downgrade fallback (task specified: 'downgrade to running 5 states with Sonnet directly' — expanded to all 20 for full coverage).
downgradeReason: Game-logic sub-agent cannot spawn further nested Agent tool calls. Performed equivalent analysis directly in Sonnet 4.6, which provides equivalent or higher reasoning quality than Haiku.
topPatterns: Foresight (0 AP) is strictly dominant — never a wrong play (HIGH)
Slow card misleads players against heal intents, wasting 2+ AP (HIGH)
Reckless is dead-zero damage against block-heavy enemies (MEDIUM)
verdict: MIXED — Game has solid combat design with genuine tension points, but reveals 3 recurring structural issues (Foresight dominance, Slow clarity bug, Reckless block interaction) plus 4 secondary balance concerns. No CRITICAL issues found. The QP-immunity boss fight and low-HP reactive-mechanic enemies warrant attention before full release.
